CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Documentation"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Closed Won") ), IMAGE("/resource/1727948760000/Green?", "Green", 20, 20), /* Return green image if status is "Documentation" or "Closed Won" */ IF( pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c >= 30, IMAGE("/resource/1727948760000/Green?", "Green", 20, 20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c, 0)) & " days remaining", IF( AND(pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c > 0, pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c < 30), IMAGE("/resource/1727950613000/Yellow?", "Yellow", 20, 20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c, 0)) & " days remaining", IF( pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c <= 0, IMAGE("/resource/1727950641000/Red?", "Red", 20, 20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(pro_Days_Left_To_Expected_BAC_Approval__c, 0)) & " days overdue", "" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Days Left To Expected BAC Approval
